warps.label: Greenhouse Floor

unlock_milestones.title: Greenhouse Repaired
unlock_milestones.text: The upper greenhouse seal finally yielded. For the first time in years, the town has one place that may truly remember how to grow for the valley instead of merely surviving it.

warps.locked_note: The staircase seal hums. The greenhouse could become the town's first real turning point if you can prove the tower is worth trusting again.

gather_nodes.name: Sunleaf
gather_nodes.note: Warm meadow patches cluster along the main road where the plains stay open to the sun.

gather_nodes.name: Field Bloom
gather_nodes.note: These meadow flowers thrive along the wagon-cut verges that stay bright through spring.

gather_nodes.name: Whisper Moss
gather_nodes.note: Low standing stones on the southern road hold just enough cool shade for a brief moss flush.

gather_nodes.name: Moon Fern
gather_nodes.note: Pale fronds gather in the first cool glade once the canopy closes out the day.

gather_nodes.name: Ember Root
gather_nodes.note: Warm roots surface where the charred hollow keeps heat trapped under the forest floor.

gather_nodes.name: Mist Moth Wing
gather_nodes.note: Wing scales catch on fern tips and bark where the grove narrows at dusk.

gather_nodes.name: Glow Moth
gather_nodes.note: Lantern moths settle only in the high glade where the canopy parts without losing shelter.

gather_nodes.name: Whisper Moss
gather_nodes.note: The shaded root line below the glade keeps enough damp for moss even when the path stays passable.

gather_nodes.name: Arcane Dust
gather_nodes.note: Residual powder settles in the upper cut where the quarry shelves fracture into narrow lanes.

gather_nodes.name: Quarry Lichen
gather_nodes.note: Cold lower shelves grow mineral lichen where quarry runoff gathers under broken ledges.

gather_nodes.name: Ember Root
gather_nodes.note: The sun-struck seam at mid-quarry throws enough heat for roots to harden between seasons.

gather_nodes.name: Reedflower
gather_nodes.note: The first reed bend west of town opens into cool flower pockets when the lake wind stays gentle.

gather_nodes.name: Dew Slug
gather_nodes.note: These gentle slugs gather where the reed beds hold cool morning moisture against the stones.

gather_nodes.name: Mist Moth Wing
gather_nodes.note: Damp dusk flights leave powder on the outer reeds and weathered dock posts.

gather_nodes.name: Moon Fern
gather_nodes.note: Shaded coves at the south edge keep enough cool reflected light for a sparse fern line.

gather_nodes.name: Whisper Moss
gather_nodes.note: Shoreline stones below the reed beds keep just enough damp for a cool-weather moss band.

gather_nodes.name: Sunspike
gather_nodes.note: Sunspike rises along the exposed dune lane once spring light turns sharp and uninterrupted.

gather_nodes.name: Arcane Dust
gather_nodes.note: Dry wind catches catalyst dust in the stone scars where the dunes thin out.

gather_nodes.name: Ember Root
gather_nodes.note: Heat-baked roots surface where the lower dunes peel back from old mineral scars.

gather_nodes.name: Whisper Moss
gather_nodes.note: Soft growth thrives where root arches shade the main jungle path even after rain breaks.

gather_nodes.name: Rain Orchid
gather_nodes.note: The brightest orchids open in wet clearings where filtered light reaches the lower jungle floor.

gather_nodes.name: Mist Moth Wing
gather_nodes.note: Dense canopy turns evening flights into a drifting ribbon of scales along the lower leaves.

gather_nodes.name: Dew Slug
gather_nodes.note: The wettest clearings near the return path gather slugs once the runoff slows enough to leave puddled edges.

warps.label: Containment Floor

unlock_milestones.title: Containment Restored
unlock_milestones.text: The containment lift answers again. The tower is ready to shelter magical creatures instead of merely studying their remains.

warps.locked_note: The containment lift stays inert. The tower wants more proven alchemy before it trusts you with creatures.

gather_nodes.name: Cultivated Sunleaf
gather_nodes.note: A sheltered patch that keeps medicinal herbs alive between seasons.

gather_nodes.name: Glasshouse Moss
gather_nodes.note: Condensation and old wards make the greenhouse stones bloom softly.

gather_nodes.name: Dew Slug
gather_nodes.note: These gentle slugs gather where greenhouse glass sweats at dawn.

warps.label: Rune Workshop

unlock_milestones.title: Rune Workshop Restored
unlock_milestones.text: The rune benches hum again. Potions can now be reshaped after brewing instead of only before it.

warps.locked_note: The rune workshop remains shuttered until the tower trusts your handling of stranger forces.

warps.label: Archives
warps.locked_note: The archive vault remains sealed until you can prove the tower's higher work is stable.

warps.label: Portal Observatory
warps.locked_note: The observatory gate does not respond until the archive timeline is complete.

gathering_routes.name: Tower Ruin Edge
gathering_routes.description: A short route around the old tower walls between the interior lab and the open plains.

gathering_routes.name: Plains Crossing
gathering_routes.description: An open plains crossroads shaped by field roads, low grass obstacles, and bright verges that read clearly even in the first spring pass.

gathering_routes.name: Stone Quarry
gathering_routes.description: A broken quarry lane with choke points, shelf cuts, and mineral scars where catalyst residue and stone-fed growth collect.

gathering_routes.name: Creekside Meadow
gathering_routes.description: The town’s inner footpaths and verge, now serving more as a crossroads than a gathering lane.

gathering_routes.name: Moonlit Grove
gathering_routes.description: The first winding forest path from the plains, with glades and canopy breaks that favor dusk gathering.

gathering_routes.name: Charred Hollow
gathering_routes.description: A hotter side pocket off the forest path where old fire scars keep roots active later into the year.

gathering_routes.name: Lake Shallows
gathering_routes.description: A curved shoreline route with reed beds, cool coves, and shallow-water edges that favor early moisture gathers.

gathering_routes.name: Sunscar Dunes
gathering_routes.description: A dune-lane approach cut by exposed stone scars and sparse shelter pockets where heat-touched growth survives.

gathering_routes.name: Rainmist Canopy
gathering_routes.description: A layered jungle path with root arches, wet clearings, and persistent mist beneath a heavy canopy.

gathering_routes.name: Greenhouse Walk
gathering_routes.description: A tiny cultivated loop that preserves a few reliable herbs inside the tower.

gathering_routes.name: Containment Ring
gathering_routes.description: Quiet habitat cells fitted for harmless magical specimens and renewable harvests.

gathering_routes.name: Archive Stack
gathering_routes.description: A sealed record hall where journals, floor logs, and theory notes can be reconstructed into one timeline.

gathering_routes.name: Observatory Span
gathering_routes.description: A high lens chamber that turns the tower's history into a final view rather than a weapon.

room_bonus.description: The entry lab still holds enough old wards to steady restorative and luminous brews.
Sun-warmed glass and irrigation sigils make careful restorative work easier here.
